headlines.title: Officials from 100 countries to attend Ayatollah Khamenei’s funeral ceremony
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA — Representatives from 100 countries, including heads of state, parliamentary leaders, foreign ministers, and special government envoys, will attend the farewell funeral procession for Martyr Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, the Foreign Ministry spokesperson announced.

headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA – A dedicated website offering guidance in five languages has been launched to help pilgrims and attendees prepare for the ceremonies honoring martyred Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei.

headlines.title: Iran’s firepower shatters regional states’ trust in US security umbrella: Report
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA - Describing the US and Israeli strikes on Iran as “illegal and unprovoked,” a UK-based media outlet says that Iran’s unexpected firepower shattered regional countries’ trust in the so-called US security umbrella.

headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA – Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian declares on Thursday that the Leader of the Islamic Revolution’s martyrdom is not an end but the dawn of a new era, as the nation prepares for a historic farewell.
